title: populus tremula subsp. davidiana
intro: Populus tremula subsp. davidiana, also known as Chinese aspen, is a deciduous tree native to China, belonging to the willow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Populus tremula subsp. davidiana include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, often used to treat various health conditions, and its bark and leaves can be used to make tinctures and ointments.
